blueprint.node.prompt: Danwa — a multi-agent debate and document analysis platform. Danwa is an online tool that facilitates debates between multiple agents (i.e., human users) on various topics. It also provides tools for analyzing documents in real time, allowing participants to collaborate effectively during the debate process. The platform features advanced AI algorithms that enable it to understand complex arguments and provide insights into the strengths and weaknesses of each argument presented by different agents. Danwa is designed to be user-friendly and accessible to anyone who wants to participate in debates or analyze documents online.

blueprint.palette.promptTemplate: Danwa is a multi-agent debate and document analysis platform that allows users to engage in debates with multiple agents on various topics. It also provides tools for analyzing documents and extracting insights from them. Danwa aims to facilitate informed decision making by providing access to diverse perspectives and data-driven insights.

documents.noContent: Danwa is a multi-agent debate and document analysis platform that allows users to engage in debates with other agents on various topics. It provides an intuitive interface for creating and managing debates, as well as analyzing documents related to the topic of discussion. Danwa also offers advanced features such as sentiment analysis, keyword extraction, and machine learning algorithms to enhance the quality of debates and document analysis. With its powerful capabilities, Danwa is a valuable tool for researchers, students, and professionals in various fields who want to explore new ideas and perspectives on different topics.
documents.noDocuments: Τα έγγραφά δεν έχουν εισαχθεί ακόμα. Επιστήστε αρχεία για να χρησιμοποιήσετε σαν πλαίσιο RAG για τους διαγωνισμούς.
documents.noRAGContext: Danwa is a multi-agent debate and document analysis platform that allows users to engage in debates with multiple agents on various topics. It provides an intuitive interface for users to create their own debates or join existing ones, as well as analyze documents and extract relevant information. Danwa also offers advanced features such as sentiment analysis, keyword extraction, and topic modeling to enhance the debate experience. With its powerful capabilities, Danwa is a valuable tool for researchers, educators, and anyone interested in exploring complex topics through multi-agent debates.
documents.ragAutoRetrieveHint: Danwa は、ケーステキストの文書を自動的に検索して、関連する文書チャンクを探し出すことができます。

nav.output: Danwa — a multi-agent debate and document analysis platform.
nav.promptVariants: Danwa is a multi-agent debate and document analysis platform that allows users to create debates on any topic they choose. Users can invite other agents to join their debates or participate in existing ones. Danwa also provides tools for analyzing documents, including text extraction, sentiment analysis, and keyword frequency analysis. The platform supports multiple languages and offers various customization options for the user interface.

renderJob.status.running: Danwa is a multi-agent debate and document analysis platform that allows users to engage in debates with multiple agents on various topics. It provides an intuitive interface for creating and managing debates, as well as analyzing documents and extracting key insights from them. Danwa also offers advanced features such as sentiment analysis, topic modeling, and natural language processing (NLP) capabilities. With its powerful tools and user-friendly design, Danwa is the perfect platform for anyone looking to engage in meaningful discussions on a wide range of topics.

translation.noTranslations: Danwa is a multi-agent debate and document analysis platform that allows users to engage in debates with multiple agents on various topics. It also provides tools for analyzing documents and extracting information from them. Danwa aims to facilitate communication between humans and machines, enabling the exchange of ideas and knowledge through debates and discussions. The platform supports both text-based and voice-based interactions, making it accessible to a wide range of users. With its advanced AI technology, Danwa offers an innovative way for people to explore complex topics and engage in meaningful conversations with intelligent agents.

workflow.execution.status.running: Danwa is a multi-agent debate and document analysis platform that allows users to engage in debates with multiple agents simultaneously. It provides an intuitive interface for users to easily create debates, manage their arguments, and analyze the outcomes of debates. Danwa also offers advanced features such as argument scoring, agent training, and real-time feedback on performance. With its powerful capabilities, Danwa is a valuable tool for anyone looking to improve their debating skills or conduct research in this field.
